case_title: HAN LING JIANG VS. GIM BONG LEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, HAN LING AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, GIM BONG EACH AS INDIVIDUALS DBA GOLDEN DRAGON RESTAURANT NG, BIG HONG EACH AS INDIVIDUALS DBA GOLDEN DRAGON RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
